case_title: MARAT DZHAFAROV et al VS. DARLA MARIE SPIERS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-23-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS (2), ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER---SVETLAVA YAGUDAYEVA.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
